attributes.action: Make it illegal to add a surcharge on alternative milks.
attributes.additional_details: Every time I order a coffee or a tea, I have to pay extra to choose a milk that won't make me ill. In many food establishments choosing plant-based milk alternatives like soy, oat, or coconut milk often comes with an extra charge. This additional cost is not just a financial burden but also a form of discrimination against those who cannot consume regular dairy. I urge lawmakers and business owners to take immediate action by eliminating the surcharge on alternative milk options.
attributes.background: I want to make it illegal to add a surcharge for alternative milks. It's crucial to recognise that plant-based milks are not just a lifestyle choice for many, but a necessity for millions who suffer from lactose intolerance or milk allergies. I urge for people to consider these changes.

rejection.details: Cafe prices reflect retail prices - it is not the Government's responsibility to set catering prices.
